content: build a  simple landing page in react  for a restaurant website

[TOOL_CALL] think({"thought":"Let me plan a beautiful restaurant landing page. I'll create:\n\n1. **Architecture**: Next.js 16 App Router with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS\n2. **Sections**:\n   - Hero with restaurant name, tagline, and CTA\n   - About section\n   - Menu highlights (featured dishes)\n   - Chef section\n   - Testimonials\n   - Reservation form\n   - Contact/Location info\n   - Footer\n\n3. **Design**: Warm, elegant restaurant aesthetic\n   - Color palette: Deep burgundy/wine primary, gold accents, cream backgrounds, dark text\n   - Typography: serif for headings (elegant), sans-serif for body\n   - High-quality food imagery feel with gradients and overlays\n   - Smooth scroll, subtle animations\n\n4. **Files needed**:\n   - src/app/layout.tsx (root layout)\n   - src/app/page.tsx (main landing page)\n   - src/app/globals.css (global styles + Tailwind)\n   - src/components/Navbar.tsx\n   - src/components/Hero.tsx\n   - src/components/About.tsx\n   - src/components/Menu.tsx\n   - src/components/Chef.tsx\n   - src/components/Testimonials.tsx\n   - src/components/Reservation.tsx\n   - src/components/Contact.tsx\n   - src/components/Footer.tsx\n   - package.json\n   - tailwind.config.ts\n   - tsconfig.json\n   - next.config.js\n   - __preview.html (standalone version)\n\nLet me build this out with a cohesive, professional restaurant design.\n"})
